# Corporate Ladder

> Corporate Ladder is a satirical office climb game in Telegram. Tap left or right, dodge meetings and reorgs, climb the org chart. Play free via @CorporateLadder_bot.

Last updated: 2026-06-04

## What it is

Telegram Mini App game (web shell at promptanatomy.lol). Not a standalone browser game — open the bot in Telegram to play.

## How to play

1. Open the Telegram bot below.
2. Tap **Punch In & Climb** (or `/start` / `/go` in groups).
3. Tap left or right to climb; manage energy; dodge meetings, reorgs, and deadlines.

## Mechanics (short)

Satirical corporate ladder climb. Energy drains over time. Rank-gated obstacles. Daily shift flavor. Score = career years survived.

## Canonical URLs

- [Telegram bot](https://t.me/corporateladder_bot): Primary entry — @CorporateLadder_bot
- [Mini App shell](https://www.promptanatomy.lol/): Web shell opened from Telegram
- [Prompt Anatomy](https://www.promptanatomy.app): Parent brand
- [Sitemap](https://www.promptanatomy.lol/sitemap.xml): Crawler URL list

## Assets

- [Link preview image](https://www.promptanatomy.lol/og.png): 1200×630 OG image
